description: Polar vectors are created using vector() with the type(polar) modifier. There is no standalone polarvector() expression. Use vector(G, length, angle, type(polar)) instead.
utility: Create a vector from polar coordinates (length and angle in degrees) using vector() with type(polar)

arguments.name: angle
arguments.description: Angle in degrees measured counterclockwise from positive x-axis

alternates.description: Polar vector from origin with given length and angle
Polar vector starting at given point variable

alternates.syntax: vector(G, length, angle, type(polar), ox, oy)

examples.scenario: Vector of length 5 at 30 degrees from origin
Vector of length 3 at 90 degrees (straight up)
Polar vector starting from a point variable
